name: PhilateLister stamp catalog
author: Exergy ∞ LLC
description: Entity shard: reference mapping from numeral killer or obliterator values (below 999) to a town or post office name, scoped by an inclusive validity period.

entities.name: numeral_cancel
entities.brief: Numeral-to-town cancel lookup within a date window.
entities.description: Each row ties one integer numeral from a postal cancel (1–998) to a town or office name for a given country; the primary key is country, numeral, and period start—period_end is the inclusive end of the validity window when resolving a strike date.

field_definitions.name: numeral_cancel_key
field_definitions.description: Natural key: issuing country, numeral, and first date of the validity window.

composite.name: country_id
composite.description: Issuing country or postal administration for this numeral assignment.

composite.name: numeral
composite.description: Integer shown in the numeral cancel or killer; strictly less than 999.

composite.name: period_start
composite.description: First date (inclusive) for which this mapping is valid.

fields.name: numeral_cancel_key
fields.description: Composite primary key (country, numeral, period start).

fields.name: country_id
fields.description: Issuing country (must match numeral_cancel_key.country_id; scalar FK enables nesting under country.numeral_cancels during consolidation).

fields.name: period_end
fields.description: Last date (inclusive) for which this mapping is valid; must be on or after period_start in the key.

fields.name: town_name
fields.description: Town, city, or post office name corresponding to the numeral for the given period.

fields.name: history
fields.description: Optional provenance or reassignment notes (e.g. territorial changes, postal renumbering).
